en: but Jesus went to the Mount of Olives.
zh: 耶穌往橄欖山去。

en: Early in the morning he came again to the temple. All the people came to him, and he sat down and taught them.
zh: 黎明的時候，他又到聖殿去，眾人都來到他那裡，他就坐下教導他們。

en: The scribes and the Pharisees brought a woman who had been caught in adultery, and placing her in the midst
zh: 經學家和法利賽人帶了一個行淫時被抓到的婦人來，叫她站在中間，

en: they said to him, "Teacher, this woman has been caught in the act of adultery.
zh: 就對耶穌說：“先生，這婦人是正在犯姦淫的時候被抓到的。

en: Now in the Law Moses commanded us to stone such women. So what do you say?"
zh: 摩西在律法上吩咐我們把這樣的婦人用石頭打死，你怎樣說呢？”

en: This they said to test him, that they might have some charge to bring against him. Jesus bent down and wrote with his finger on the ground.
zh: 他們說這話是要試探耶穌，要找把柄來控告他。耶穌卻彎下身，用指頭在地上寫字。

en: And as they continued to ask him, he stood up and said to them, "Let him who is without sin among you be the first to throw a stone at her."
zh: 他們不住地問耶穌，他就挺起身來，說：“你們中間誰是沒有罪的，他就可以先拿起石頭打她。”

en: And once more he bent down and wrote on the ground.
zh: 於是又彎下身在地上寫字。

en: But when they heard it, they went away one by one, beginning with the older ones, and Jesus was left alone with the woman standing before him.
zh: 他們聽了這話，就從年老的開始，一個一個地都離開了，留下的只有耶穌和那個還站在那裡的婦人。

en: Jesus stood up and said to her, "Woman, where are they? Has no one condemned you?"
zh: 耶穌挺起身來，問她：“婦人，他們在哪裡？沒有人定你的罪嗎？”

en: She said, "No one, Lord." And Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you; go, and from now on sin no more."]]
zh: 她說：“主啊！沒有。”耶穌說：“我也不定你的罪。走吧，從現在起不要再犯罪了。”

en: Again Jesus spoke to them, saying, "I am the light of the world. Whoever follows me will not walk in darkness, but will have the light of life."
zh: 耶穌又對眾人說：“我是世界的光，跟從我的，必定不在黑暗裡走，卻要得著生命的光。”

en: So the Pharisees said to him, "You are bearing witness about yourself; your testimony is not true."
zh: 法利賽人對他說：“你為自己作證，你的見證不是真實的。”

en: Jesus answered, "Even if I do bear witness about myself, my testimony is true, for I know where I came from and where I am going, but you do not know where I come from or where I am going.
zh: 耶穌回答：“即使我為自己作證，我的見證還是真實的，因為我知道我從哪裡來，往哪裡去，但你們卻不知道我從哪裡來，往哪裡去。

en: You judge according to the flesh; I judge no one.
zh: 你們按著外貌判斷人，我卻不判斷人。

en: Yet even if I do judge, my judgment is true, for it is not I alone who judge, but I and the Father who sent me.
zh: 即使我判斷人，我的判斷也是正確的，因為我不是獨自一人，而是差我來的父和我在一起。

en: In your Law it is written that the testimony of two men is true.
zh: 你們的律法上也寫著：‘兩個人的見證才是真的。’

en: I am the one who bears witness about myself, and the Father who sent me bears witness about me."
zh: 我為自己作證，差我來的父也為我作證。”

en: They said to him therefore, "Where is your Father?" Jesus answered, "You know neither me nor my Father. If you knew me, you would know my Father also."
zh: 他們問：“你的父在哪裡？”耶穌回答：“你們不認識我，也不認識我的父；如果你們認識我，也就認識我的父了。”

en: These words he spoke in the treasury, as he taught in the temple; but no one arrested him, because his hour had not yet come.
zh: 這些話是耶穌在殿裡教導人的時候，在銀庫的院中說的。當時沒有人逮捕他，因為他的時候還沒有到。

en: So he said to them again, "I am going away, and you will seek me, and you will die in your sin. Where I am going, you cannot come."
zh: 耶穌又對他們說：“我要去了，你們要尋找我，並且要在自己的罪中死亡；我去的地方，你們不能到。”

en: So the Jews said, "Will he kill himself, since he says, 'Where I am going, you cannot come'?"
zh: 於是猶太人說：“他說‘我去的地方，你們不能到’，難道他要自殺嗎？”

en: He said to them, "You are from below; I am from above. You are of this world; I am not of this world.
zh: 耶穌說：“你們是從地上來的，我是從天上來的；你們屬這世界，我卻不屬這世界，

en: I told you that you would die in your sins, for unless you believe that I am he you will die in your sins."
zh: 所以我對你們說，你們要在自己的罪中死亡；你們若不信我就是‘那一位’，就要在自己的罪中死亡。”

en: So they said to him, "Who are you?" Jesus said to them, "Just what I have been telling you from the beginning.
zh: 他們就問：“你是誰？”耶穌說：“我不是從起初就告訴你們嗎？

en: I have much to say about you and much to judge, but he who sent me is true, and I declare to the world what I have heard from him."
zh: 關於你們，我有許多事要說，要判斷；但那差我來的是真實的，我從他那裡聽見的，就告訴世人。”

en: They did not understand that he had been speaking to them about the Father.
zh: 他們不明白耶穌是對他們講論父的事。

en: So Jesus said to them, "When you have lifted up the Son of Man, then you will know that I am he, and that I do nothing on my own authority, but speak just as the Father taught me.
zh: 所以耶穌說：“你們舉起了人子以後，必定知道我就是‘那一位’，並且知道我不憑著自己作甚麼事；我說的這些話，是照著父所教導我的。

en: And he who sent me is with me. He has not left me alone, for I always do the things that are pleasing to him."
zh: 那差我來的和我同在，他沒有留下我獨自一人，因為我常作他喜悅的事。”

en: As he was saying these things, many believed in him.
zh: 耶穌說這些話的時候，就有許多人信了他。

en: So Jesus said to the Jews who had believed in him, "If you abide in my word, you are truly my disciples,
zh: 於是耶穌對信了他的猶太人說：“你們若持守我的道，就真是我的門徒了；

en: and you will know the truth, and the truth will set you free."
zh: 你們必定認識真理，真理必定使你們自由。”

en: They answered him, "We are offspring of Abraham and have never been enslaved to anyone. How is it that you say, 'You will become free'?"
zh: 他們說：“我們是亞伯拉罕的後裔，從來沒有被誰奴役過，你怎麼說‘你們必得自由’呢？”

en: Jesus answered them, "Truly, truly, I say to you, everyone who commits sin is a slave to sin.
zh: 耶穌說：“我實實在在告訴你們，凡犯罪的都是罪的奴隸。

en: The slave does not remain in the house forever; the son remains forever.
zh: 奴隸不能永遠住在家裡，唯有兒子才可以永遠住在家裡。

en: So if the Son sets you free, you will be free indeed.
zh: 所以， 神的兒子若使你們自由，你們就真的得自由了。

en: I know that you are offspring of Abraham; yet you seek to kill me because my word finds no place in you.
zh: 我知道你們是亞伯拉罕的後裔；但你們想殺我，因為你們心裡不能容納我的道。

en: I speak of what I have seen with my Father, and you do what you have heard from your father."
zh: 我所說的，是我在父那裡看見的；但你們所作的，卻是從你們的父那裡聽見的。”

en: They answered him, "Abraham is our father." Jesus said to them, "If you were Abraham's children, you would be doing what Abraham did,
zh: 他們說：“我們的祖宗是亞伯拉罕。”耶穌說：“你們若是亞伯拉罕的子孫，就必作亞伯拉罕所作的。

en: but now you seek to kill me, a man who has told you the truth that I heard from God. This is not what Abraham did.
zh: 現在我把從 神那裡聽見的真理告訴了你們，你們竟然想殺我，這不是亞伯拉罕所作的。

en: You are doing what your father did." They said to him, "We were not born of sexual immorality. We have one Father- even God."
zh: 你們要作的，正是你們的父要作的。”他們說：“我們不是從淫亂生的；我們只有一位父，就是 神。”

en: Jesus said to them, "If God were your Father, you would love me, for I came from God and I am here. I came not of my own accord, but he sent me.
zh: 耶穌說：“如果 神是你們的父，你們就必愛我，因為我是從 神那裡來的；我已經來到這裡。我不是憑著自己來的，而是 神差了我來。

en: Why do you not understand what I say? It is because you cannot bear to hear my word.
zh: 你們為甚麼不明白我的話呢？因為我的道你們聽不進去。

en: You are of your father the devil, and your will is to do your father's desires. He was a murderer from the beginning, and has nothing to do with the truth, because there is no truth in him. When he lies, he speaks out of his own character, for he is a liar and the father of lies.
zh: 你們是出於你們的父魔鬼，喜歡按著你們的父的私慾行事。他從起初就是殺人的兇手，不守真理，因為他心裡沒有真理。他說謊是出於本性，因為他本來就是說謊者，也是說謊的人的父。

en: But because I tell the truth, you do not believe me.
zh: 我講真理，你們卻因此不信我。

en: Which one of you convicts me of sin? If I tell the truth, why do you not believe me?
zh: 你們中間有誰能指證我有罪呢？我既然講真理，你們為甚麼不信我呢？

en: Whoever is of God hears the words of God. The reason why you do not hear them is that you are not of God."
zh: 出於 神的，就聽 神的話；你們不聽，因為你們不是出於 神的。”

en: The Jews answered him, "Are we not right in saying that you are a Samaritan and have a demon?"
zh: 猶太人對耶穌說：“我們說你是撒瑪利亞人，並且是鬼附的，不是很對嗎？”

en: Jesus answered, "I do not have a demon, but I honor my Father, and you dishonor me.
zh: 耶穌回答：“我不是鬼附的。我尊敬我的父，你們卻侮辱我。

en: Yet I do not seek my own glory; there is One who seeks it, and he is the judge.
zh: 我不求自己的榮耀，但有一位是為我求榮耀，並且是審判人的。

en: Truly, truly, I say to you, if anyone keeps my word, he will never see death."
zh: 我實實在在告訴你們，人若遵守我的道，必定永遠不見死亡。”

en: The Jews said to him, "Now we know that you have a demon! Abraham died, as did the prophets, yet you say, 'If anyone keeps my word, he will never taste death.'
zh: 猶太人對他說：“現在我們知道你的確是鬼附的。亞伯拉罕死了，先知們也死了，你還說‘人若遵守我的道，必定永遠不嘗死味’，

en: Are you greater than our father Abraham, who died? And the prophets died! Who do you make yourself out to be?"
zh: 難道你比我們的祖宗亞伯拉罕還大嗎？他死了，先知們也死了；你把自己當作甚麼人呢？”

en: Jesus answered, "If I glorify myself, my glory is nothing. It is my Father who glorifies me, of whom you say, 'He is our God.'
zh: 耶穌回答：“如果我榮耀自己，我的榮耀就算不得甚麼；那使我得榮耀的是我的父，就是你們說是你們的 神的那一位。

en: But you have not known him. I know him. If I were to say that I do not know him, I would be a liar like you, but I do know him and I keep his word.
zh: 可是你們不認識他，我卻認識他。如果我說我不認識他，我就像你們一樣是說謊的；然而我認識他，也遵守他的道。

en: Your father Abraham rejoiced that he would see my day. He saw it and was glad."
zh: 你們的祖宗亞伯拉罕，因為可以看見我的日子就歡喜，既然看見了，他就很快樂。”

en: So the Jews said to him, "You are not yet fifty years old, and have you seen Abraham?"
zh: 猶太人對他說：“你還不到五十歲，怎會見過亞伯拉罕呢？”

en: Jesus said to them, "Truly, truly, I say to you, before Abraham was, I am."
zh: 耶穌說：“我實實在在告訴你們，亞伯拉罕出生以前，我已經存在了。”

en: So they picked up stones to throw at him, but Jesus hid himself and went out of the temple.
zh: 於是他們拿起石頭要打他。耶穌卻躲起來，從殿裡出去了。
